v0.3.0 · Angular + .NET Core

Colours

Semantic colour tokens. These reference the underlying primitive palette via CSS custom properties — swapping light/dark mode updates all of them automatically. Use --color-* tokens in your Angular components.

Surface
surface-page
--color-surface-page
surface-default
--color-surface-default
surface-subtle

surface-scroll

Typography

Proxima Nova across all scales. Use the SCSS mixins in Angular components: @include ds.type-title-h1; — or reference the CSS vars directly.

Spacing

7-step spacing scale. Use --spacing-* CSS vars or $spacing-* SCSS variables. The SCSS variables use direct pixel values so they work inside calc().

$spacing-none
0px
0px
$spacing-xs
--spacing-xs
4px
$spacing-sm
--spacing-sm
8px
$spacing-md
--spacing-md
12px
$spacing-lg
--spacing-lg
16px
$spacing-xl
--spacing-xl
24px
$spacing-page
--spacing-page
48px

Border Radius

Use --radius-* CSS vars or $radius-* SCSS variables.

$radius-none
0px
$radius-sm
6px
$radius-md
8px
$radius-lg
16px
$radius-xl
24px
$radius-full
9999px — pill

Shadows

Three elevation levels. The shadow colour token is what changes between themes — combine it with box-shadow offsets in your components.

elevation-1
0 1px 2px
elevation-2
0 2px 4px
elevation-3
0 4px 8px

Overlays

Semi-transparent interaction states applied on top of surface colours. Use as background on a pseudo-element over the base surface.

overlay-hovered
8% opacity
overlay-pressed
12% opacity
overlay-focused
12% opacity
overlay-dragged
16% opacity

8% opacity

16% opacity
accent-yellow-hovered
8% opacity
accent-yellow-pressed
12% opacity
accent-yellow-focused
12% opacity
accent-yellow-dragged
16% opacity

Icons

Icon colour tokens. Apply as fill or color on SVG icons in Angular components. Use --color-icon-* CSS vars or $icon-* SCSS variables. All icons use Material Symbols Rounded — the font variant controls the rounded style, not the icon name. Use <span class="ds-icon">icon_name</span> for outlined (default) or add ds-icon--filled for the filled variant.

Core
icon-default
--color-icon-default
icon-subtle
--color-icon-subtle
icon-disabled

icon-inverse

icon-nav
--color-icon-nav
icon-nav-active
--color-icon-nav-active

Input Field

Text Fields — Input, Select, and Textarea share the same visual design in Figma: 42px field height (textarea: min-height, resizable), same label, helper, and error token usage. In Angular they map to different Angular Material modules: MatInputModule (input), MatSelectModule (select), and MatInputModule with <textarea> (textarea).
This section shows all three together. Use class="ds-input", class="ds-select", or class="ds-textarea" directly, or the corresponding Angular component. Source: components/input/, components/select/, components/textarea/

Default variants
Supporting text
Supporting text
Default
We'll never share your email.
With Icons
lock
Prefix / Suffix
$ USD
https://
Error
mail error
Enter a valid email address.
error
Username is required.
Disabled / Read-only
This field cannot be changed.
workspace_premium
Contact sales to change your plan.

Search Field

components/search/_search.scss

A search input for filtering or finding content. A variant of ds-input — uses ds-input + ds-search classes on the wrapper. Shows a leading search icon and a clear button when text is present. Focus ring only appears on keyboard navigation (Tab key), not on mouse click.

Default
search
Hover
search
Focus (keyboard)
search
With value
search
Disabled
search
Live demo
search

Select / Dropdown

Same 42px height and visual treatment as Input Field. Angular component uses MatSelectModule — mat-select inside mat-form-field provides role="listbox", keyboard navigation, and screen reader announcements. CSS class API uses a branded interactive dropdown (.ds-select__field-row + .ds-select__dropdown + .ds-menu panel). Use class="ds-select" or <ds-select>. Source: components/select/_select.scss

Default
arrow_drop_down
arrow_drop_down
With Helper
arrow_drop_down
Affects all scheduled reports.
Error
error
Please select a role.
Disabled
arrow_drop_down
Contact sales to change your plan.

Autocomplete

Type-to-filter text input. Visually identical to Input Field (42px, same label / helper / error pattern). The dropdown panel and all filtering logic are owned by the consumer — this component provides only the input field chrome. Angular component uses MatAutocompleteModule + MatInputModule; pass a <mat-autocomplete> ref via [panel]. The demo below includes a working interactive dropdown (CSS class API) — focus the field or start typing to see options filter. In Angular, the consumer provides the <mat-autocomplete> panel and filtering logic. Source: components/autocomplete/_autocomplete.scss

With Dropdown
arrow_drop_down

Bob Miller
Carol White
David Lee
Eva Torres

error
Please select a valid owner.
Disabled / Read-only
arrow_drop_down
Editing is not available.
arrow_drop_down
Set automatically from the ticket.

Textarea

Multi-line text input — resizable vertically, no fixed height. Same visual treatment as Input Field. Angular Material: MatInputModule with <textarea>. Use class="ds-textarea" or <ds-textarea>. Source: components/textarea/_textarea.scss

Default
Visible only to team members.
Error
Summary is required.
Disabled / Read-only
Read-only system record.

Date Picker

components/datepicker/_datepicker.scss

Single date picker (ds-datepicker) and date range picker (ds-date-range-picker) — both styled identically to ds-input: 42px height, same label, helper, and error token usage. Built on Angular Material MatDatepickerModule + MatNativeDateModule. The calendar popup is globally styled via .mat-datepicker-content overrides. The preview demos below use native <input type="date"> — click the field to type a date manually, or click the calendar icon to open the browser date picker. The calendar popup mockup shows the Onflo-themed Angular Material popup design. Source: components/datepicker/_datepicker.scss

Single — default
Must be a future date.
Single — error
error
Date is required.
error
Date cannot be in the past.
Single — disabled
calendar_today
Set by the system.
Range — default
–
–

Calendar popup

April 2026

S M T W T F S

Rich Text Editor

components/rich-text-editor/_rich-text-editor.scss

Full-featured rich text editor (ds-rich-text-editor) — powered by CKEditor 5 with a custom Onflo toolbar. The toolbar provides Bold, Italic, Underline, Remove Formatting, Link, Bulleted List, and Numbered List. An optional expand button opens a larger modal editor. An optional drag handle in the bottom-right corner lets the user resize the height. Third-party dependency: @ckeditor/ckeditor5-angular + @ckeditor/ckeditor5-build-classic. Source: components/rich-text-editor/_rich-text-editor.scss

Default

Hover

Checkbox

Standard checkbox with label. Supports unchecked, checked, indeterminate, error, and disabled states. Source: components/checkbox/_checkbox.scss

Unchecked
Checked
Indeterminate
Error

Radio Button

Single radio within a group. States: unselected, selected, error, disabled. Source: components/radio/_radio.scss

Default Group
States
Error State
Disabled

Toggle / Switch

Binary on/off control. States: off, on, disabled-off, disabled-on. With and without label. Source: components/toggle/_toggle.scss

Off / On
With icon
No label
Disabled

Button

Five variants covering every action context. All interactive states (hover, focus, pressed, disabled) are token-driven. Use class="ds-button ds-button--filled" directly, or the Angular component <ds-button variant="filled">. Toggle groups use ds-button--outlined.is-selected + aria-pressed inside a ds-button-group wrapper (role="group" + aria-label). Angular: [selected]="true|false" input binds both class and aria-pressed. Source: components/button/_button.scss

Filled
Outlined
Text
Destructive
Destr. Outlined
Error
Loading
Toggle group
Toggle group sm

Icon Button

Four variants for icon-only actions. Toggle behaviour available via ds-icon-button-toggle. Use class="ds-icon-button ds-icon-button--filled" directly, or the Angular component <ds-icon-button variant="filled" ariaLabel="...">. Source: components/icon-button/_icon-button.scss

Ghost
Filled
Outlined
Monogram
Small (32px)
Toggle Ghost
Toggle Filled
Toggle Outlined
Toggle Outlined Letter

Menu

components/menu/_menu.scss

Dropdown and context menus triggered by button click or right-click. Supports icons, dividers, section labels, single-select, multi-select (ds-checkbox), search for long dynamic lists, and multi-level nested menus. Based on Angular Material MatMenuModule — CDK Overlay handles positioning and keyboard navigation. Control panel direction via [xPosition] and [yPosition] on <ds-menu>; the panel auto-flips at viewport edges. Destructive items are neutral by default — red only on hover/active (same as ds-button--destructive text).

Basic
Section labels
Account
Workspace

Snackbar

Toast notifications shown top-center. Three layout variants. Launched via MatSnackBar.openFromComponent(DsSnackbarComponent, { panelClass: 'ds-snackbar-panel', verticalPosition: 'top', horizontalPosition: 'center' }). Source: components/snackbar/_snackbar.scss

Text only
Changes saved successfully.
Text only + close
Changes saved successfully.
Text & action
Item moved to archive.
Text & action + close
Item moved to archive.
Text & longer action
This item will be permanently deleted after 30 days.
Text & longer action + close
This item will be permanently deleted after 30 days.

Alert / Banner

Inline status banners. Variants: info, success, warning, error. Sizes: sm (default) | lg. Source: components/alert/_alert.scss

SM — info
info

The system will be unavailable on Sunday from 2–4 AM UTC for scheduled maintenance.

SM — success
check_circle

Your profile has been updated successfully.

SM — error + dismiss
error

We couldn't process your payment. Please update your billing information.

LG — error
error Something went wrong

An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.

LG — warning
warning Unsaved changes

You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you navigate away from this page.

LG — info + actions
info New version available

A new version of the application is available. Update now to get the latest features and security improvements.

LG — info + 1 action
info Heads up

Your session will expire in 15 minutes due to inactivity. Save your work to avoid losing any changes.

LG — success
check_circle Import complete

342 records were imported successfully. You can review them in the data table below.

Badge

Notification indicator primitive. Two sizes: Large (20px count circle) and Small (6×6px dot). Three color variants: red (default, notification), blue (informational), grey (neutral/inactive). Used overlaid on icon buttons or inline in tabs. Angular: <ds-badge [count]="3" />, <ds-badge [dot]="true" variant="blue" />. Source: components/badge/_badge.scss

Large — Red

Large — Grey
3 12 99+

3
3
On tab

Tooltip

Angular directive: [dsTooltip] composes MatTooltip via hostDirectives — CDK Overlay handles rendering, positioning, and keyboard behaviour. Positions: above (default) | below | left | right. The CSS class API below uses a wrapper for the HTML-only preview. Source: components/tooltip/_tooltip.scss

Top (default)
Save changes to your profile
Cmd + S
Below
Opens in a new tab
Left & Right
This appears on the left
This appears on the right

Progress / Loader

Linear progress bar. Determinate (0–100%) and indeterminate (animated). Source: components/progress/_progress.scss

Determinate
25% — In progress
60% — Uploading file
100% — Complete
Indeterminate
Loading...

Hover Card

A floating information card that follows the cursor, shown on hover or keyboard focus of a trigger element. Use for inline previews or contextual information — never for critical actions. Variants: bottom (card below cursor, accent on top) and top (card above cursor, accent on bottom). Source: components/hover-card/_hover-card.scss

Chip

Compact interactive element representing a filter or removable input. Background is always --color-surface-brand (light blue). Default state has no border. Hover reveals --color-border-hover + overlay-hovered tint; press reveals --color-border-active + overlay-pressed tint. .is-active = persistent selected state (border-active, no overlay). Source: components/chip/_chip.scss

Tag

Navy pill chip for showing applied tags/filters. Background is --color-surface-accent-navy with --color-text-primary. Three variants: default (removable or read-only), more (overflow count), add (dashed-border action button). Sizes: MD (32px) and SM (24px). Source: components/tag/_tag.scss

Tabs

Page-level navigation tabs. 48px fixed height, always bold, always primary colour. Selected state: 2px brand-blue bar at bottom. Badge is a 6px red dot (not a count). Source: components/tabs/_tabs.scss

Panel content for the selected tab.

List Item

components/list/_list.scss

A structured list of items. Supports leading/trailing content slots (icon, checkbox, avatar), optional overline, primary text, and supporting text. Add .ds-list-item--interactive for hover/focus/pressed states (used inside menus and nav lists). Checkbox-only lists omit the interactive modifier.

Card

components/card/_card.scss

Large vertical content card with an optional header (icon, title, subtitle, close button), a body content area, and an optional actions footer. Angular component: <ds-card> with [icon], [title], [subtitle], [showClose] inputs and (closeClick) output. Project body content into the default slot; project footer buttons into [card-actions]. Variants: outlined (default) and elevated.

Full card
folder

Your shared documents are synced and up to date. Last sync was 3 minutes ago.

bar_chart

Performance

Last 30 days

Average handle time is down 8% compared to the previous period. First contact resolution improved to 74%.

Header + body
info

Account notice

Your subscription renews on May 1st. No action is needed — your payment method on file will be charged automatically.

No icon

Subtitle only

A card without a leading icon — close button stays pinned to the top right of the header.

Body only

A card with no header — body content fills the full card with standard padding on all sides.

Body-only card with actions below.

Any content can go inside the body — forms, stats, lists, or prose.

Card Item

components/card/_card.scss

Compact horizontal card with flexible leading and trailing slots. Leading/trailing content is flush to the card edge — images fill edge-to-edge, icons sit flush left or right. --no-leading / --no-trailing add 16px outer padding when the slot is absent (Angular sets these automatically). Use --interactive for hoverable/clickable cards: both variants gain a hover border + overlay on interaction; elevated also carries its shadow at rest. Angular component: <ds-card-item> with [primary], [secondary], [interactive], [variant], [disabled] inputs, (cardClick) output, and content slots [leading], [trailing], [card-action].

Branded illustration + message for content areas with no data. Sizes: sm (default) | lg. Layouts: vertical (default) | horizontal. Optional description and action slot. Source: components/empty-state/_empty-state.scss

Nav Button

components/nav-button/_nav-button.scss

Primary navigation rail button — represents a top-level Onflo product section. Each type has a fixed icon and label. States: default (transparent), hover, pressed, and selected (blue background, white icon + text). Internal primitive used inside nav-sidebar.

Default
Selected
Interactive

Subnav Button

components/subnav-button/_subnav-button.scss

Leaf navigation item inside the sub-navigation panel — represents a single destination. Selected state fills with brand blue and turns text white. Angular component: <ds-subnav-button> with [label], [selected], [disabled] inputs and (navClick) output.

Default
Selected
Disabled
Interactive

Subnav Subheader

components/subnav-subheader/_subnav-subheader.scss

Expandable section grouping label within the sub-navigation panel. Shows arrow_right when collapsed, arrow_drop_down when expanded. Expanded state shows child nav items indented with a left vertical accent line (--color-border-subtle). Angular component: <ds-subnav-subheader> with [text], [expanded], [(expanded)] two-way binding, [disabled], and ng-content for child ds-subnav-button items.

Collapsed
Expanded
Disabled
Interactive

Subnav Header

components/subnav-header/_subnav-header.scss

Top-level collapsible section header for the sub-navigation panel. Shows a 12px section icon (language by default), a label, and an expand arrow. Uses Label Small (12px) typography and --color-icon-subtle text — lighter than the subheader. When expanded, child items appear with 8px left indent and no vertical divider. Angular component: <ds-subnav-header> with [text], [icon], [expanded], [(expanded)] two-way binding, [disabled], and ng-content for child items.

Collapsed
Expanded
Custom icon
Interactive

Agent Status

components/agent-status/_agent-status.scss

Nav sidebar indicator for support agent availability. Tapping opens a status picker (dropdown not shown here — this is the primitive). Two variants: call (phone support) and live (live chat). States: online (green dot) and offline (grey dot). Icon and dot colour change; text stays --color-text-primary. Internal primitive — used inside nav-sidebar.

Call agent
Live agent
Interactive

Nav Sidebar

components/nav-sidebar/_nav-sidebar.scss

Main left navigation sidebar — composes ds-nav-button (product-section rail) and ds-agent-status (call/live queue availability) into the primary nav pattern. 80px wide, height: 100% (fills its containing column). Angular: <ds-nav-sidebar> with [logo], [nav], and [bottom] content projection slots. ADA: role="navigation" and aria-label="Main navigation" on the inner <nav>.

Interactive

Nav Tab

components/nav-tab/_nav-tab.scss

Browser-style document tab used inside the top navigation bar. Each open page or window spawns a new tab. Clicking a tab activates it (dark blue); only one can be active at a time. The × close button dismisses the tab and activates the next one. Internal primitive — used inside ds-top-nav.

Inactive
Ticket #4401
Active
Ticket #4401
More / overflow
...

Top Nav

components/top-nav/_top-nav.scss

Application-wide top navigation bar. Browser-style document tabs sit on the left — one tab per open page, active tab turns dark blue, only one active at a time. When tabs overflow the available strip width the rightmost slot collapses into a ds-nav-tab--more indicator ("..."). Clicking it opens an overflow panel listing the hidden tabs — each row has a close button, and "Close all tabs" clears everything at once. Action icon buttons on the right are 32px circular buttons — use the --orange, --green, and --navy modifiers for colour variants. Composes ds-nav-tab primitives inside.

Interactive
Resize the window to trigger overflow
3

Nav Expand

components/nav-expand/_nav-expand.scss

The expand/collapse toggle for the sub-navigation panel. 24×24px, white background, 4px border-radius, elevation-3 drop shadow. Icon is right_panel_open when the panel is visible, right_panel_close when hidden — both in the filled style, brand blue. Hover and pressed states use the brand-blue tinted overlays (--overlay-hovered, --overlay-pressed). Positioning (absolute, at the right edge of the subnav) is applied by the parent composition — not defined on this component. Internal primitive — used inside ds-page-layout.

Open (panel visible)
Closed (panel hidden)
Interactive

Split Page

CSS pattern · preview/index.html · see .claude/specs/specs-layout.md §Split Page Layout

Two-panel content area for detail views — a list or context panel beside a primary content panel. Used inside ds-page-content__main. Five fixed split ratios: 50/50, 70/30, 30/70, 75/25, and 25/75. Add ds-split-page--resizable and the ds-split-page__handle element for a drag handle. Angular: use CdkDragModule from @angular/cdk/drag-drop on the handle for production — fixed 50/50 is acceptable in hi-fi prototypes.

50 / 50

Form Section Title

components/utilities/_utilities.scss

Heading for a named section within a page body or form. Always applied to an <h2> — the page <h1> is the page title; section titles are the next level down in the heading hierarchy. Uses Title H3 typography and --color-text-primary. Separate sections with ds-divider.

Section title

Personal Information

Two sections

Personal Information

Account Settings

Screen Reader Only

components/utilities/_utilities.scss

Visually hides an element while keeping it accessible to screen readers and assistive technology. Use ds-sr-only on any element that must exist in the DOM for ADA compliance but should not be visible. Primary use case: pages with no visible page title (Inbox, Ticket View) still require a hidden <h1> for screen reader heading navigation.

Hidden H1
<h1 class="ds-page-content__title ds-sr-only">Inbox</h1> No visible output — the H1 is present in the DOM for screen readers but invisible to sighted users.

Inbox

Visible comparison
<h1 class="ds-page-content__title">Contacts</h1>

Contacts

Dialog

components/dialog/_dialog.scss

Focused overlay for confirmations, forms, and alerts. Body slot holds all content (title, body text, form fields); actions slot holds the button row — always present. Wrap in ds-dialog-backdrop for static HTML. Angular component: <ds-dialog> with [showDivider] and [titleId] inputs. Project body content into [dialog-body]; buttons into [dialog-actions]. ADA: Focus trapped while open; Escape dismisses; set titleId to wire up aria-labelledby to the heading. Source: components/dialog/_dialog.scss

Confirmation

Confirm delete

This action will permanently delete the selected item. Once deleted, it cannot be recovered.

With select

Assign to team

Choose a team to assign this conversation to. The selected team will be notified immediately.

arrow_drop_down

Save Bar

components/save-bar/_save-bar.scss

Persistent bar that appears when a user has unsaved changes — provides Cancel, Save Progress, and Save and Exit actions. Two variants: default (blue border, info dot) and error (red border, error dot). ADA: role="status" (default) / role="alert" (error) with aria-live to announce appearance. Angular component: <ds-save-bar> with (cancelClick), (saveProgressClick), and (saveAndExitClick) outputs.

Default
You have unsaved changes
Error
Required information missing
Interactive
You have unsaved changes
Cancel resets to default · Save and Exit triggers error state

Modal

components/modal/_modal.scss

Full-featured modal panel with a sticky header, always-scrollable body, optional tabs row below the header, and an optional sticky actions footer. Two dismiss variants: close (×) hides the view; collapse (collapse_content icon) minimizes to a tray. Two sizes: fixed (500px, default) and full (fills available space). Omit the actions footer entirely when no actions are needed. Angular component: <ds-modal> with [title], [subtitle], [variant], [size], and (dismissClick). Project body content into the default slot; use [modal-tabs] and [modal-actions] marker attributes for the tabs and actions slots.

Close / Actions

Modal Title

Optional subtitle or context description

This is the scrollable body area. It accepts any content — forms, lists, media, or rich text. The header and footer remain fixed while this region scrolls independently.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco.

Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur.

Collapse / Actions

Modal Title

Optional subtitle or context description

Collapse variant — the dismiss icon indicates this panel can be minimized to a tray rather than fully closed. Typically used in workflows where the user may need to return to the modal.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.

Close / Tabs / Actions

Modal Title

Tabs variant — a tab row sits directly below the header with no gap. The tab row has a bottom border that acts as the container rule. Body content scrolls independently of the header and tabs.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

No actions footer

Informational Modal

No footer actions — use when the modal is purely informational or when the only action is the dismiss button. The body grows to fill all available space below the header.

No ds-modal__actions footer element — the body automatically expands to the bottom edge of the modal.

Interactive

Filter Bar

components/filter-bar/_filter-bar.scss

Applied-filters strip rendered between the table toolbar and the table when filters are active. Each active bucket is shown as a ds-card-item chip with a leading group icon, primary bucket label, and comma-joined item list. Clicking the chip body emits (filterClick) so the consumer can re-open ds-filter; clicking × emits (selectionChange) with that bucket removed. Angular component: <ds-filter-bar> with [selection], [groups], (selectionChange), and (filterClick). Hide with [hidden]="filterCount === 0" — the component does not self-hide.

Filter

components/filter/_filter.scss

Full-screen filter modal with a three-panel layout — left group navigation + search, center option cards / tier accordions / range pickers, and a dark right panel for selected-filters summary with optional saved-sets support. Angular component: <ds-filter> with [(open)], [groups], [(selection)], [savedSetsKey], and (filterCountChange). Group types: flat options[], tiered tiers[] (each tier: checkbox / date-range / cost-range / numeric-range), or type="date-preset".

Interactive

Metric Card

components/metric-card/_metric-card.scss

KPI tile for dashboards. Displays a prominently-sized primary value with an optional label, icon, trend indicator, and loading skeleton. Angular component: <ds-metric-card> with [value], [label], [icon], [trend] (number, positive = green ↑, negative = red ↓), [trendLabel], [variant] ('default' | 'brand'), and [loading].

Chart

components/chart/_chart.scss

Unified chart component wrapping Highcharts with the Onflo color palette, typography, and visual theme pre-applied. Requires highcharts as a peer dependency. Angular component: <ds-chart> with [type] ('line' | 'area' | 'bar' | 'column' | 'donut' | 'pie'), [series] (Highcharts.SeriesOptionsType[]), [categories], [title], [height], [legend], [loading], and [options] (Highcharts.Options escape hatch). The Onflo theme is applied globally on first render via Highcharts.setOptions(onfloChartTheme) — also importable directly for apps using Highcharts outside ds-chart. Preview below uses representative SVG — the Angular component renders live Highcharts.

AG Grid Paginator

Custom pagination panel for AG Grid — replaces the built-in AG Grid pagination bar. Use with suppressPaginationPanel: true in grid options. Register as a status bar component or place standalone below the grid.

Table Toolbar

Toolbar displayed above an AG Grid table. Left panel holds action buttons (hidden when not needed); right panel holds a search field, optional extra controls, and the always-present filter/settings toggles plus an optional download button. Filter and settings are toggleable; download is shown by default.

components/table-toolbar/table-toolbar.component.ts

With actions
search
Search only (no actions)
search
With extra controls (filter active)
search
arrow_drop_down

Table Status Bar

Pinned aggregate row displayed between the data rows and the paginator. Left side shows row counts; right side shows numeric aggregates (average, count, min, max, sum) driven by range selection. Registers as an AG Grid status panel via agInit(params).

components/table/table-status-bar.component.ts

All values
Rows: 100 Total Rows: 200
Average: 4,250.00 Count: 100 Min: 1,200.00 Max: 57,800.00 Sum: 425,000.00
Counts only
Rows: 3,842 Total Rows: 3,842

Table Row Groups Bar

Bar between the toolbar and the column header row. Provides a drag-drop target for columns to set row grouping and shows active row groups as removable chips. Bind [api] to auto-sync with AG Grid column state. Auto-hides via [hidden] host binding when no row groups are active.

components/table/table-row-groups-bar.component.ts

No groups
drag_indicator Drag here to set row groups
With groups
drag_indicator
Department Status

Table Group Row Cell

AG Grid custom renderer for full-width group rows. Used when groupDisplayType: 'groupRows' is set. Shows an animated expand/collapse chevron, the grouped field label and value, a child count, and optional aggregated column values on the right. Supports 4 nesting levels (24px indent per level). Pair with DsTableGroupExpansionStore to persist open/closed state across page navigations via localStorage.

components/table/table-group-row-cell.component.ts

Column Panel

Side panel that opens when the gear toolbar button is toggled. Provides density toggle, column visibility (checkbox + drag to reorder), pivot mode switch, row groups, and values sections. Registers as an AG Grid tool panel via agInit(params). Width is fixed at 300px; shown via [data-panel-open] on the enclosing table container. Columns with lockVisible: true (checkbox cols, pinned action cols) are hidden from the Column Visibility list entirely — not shown as disabled. Columns with suppressColumnsToolPanel: true are also hidden.

Table Context Menu

components/table/_table-context-menu.scss · table-context-menu.component.ts

Right-click context menu for AG Grid column headers and data row cells. Uses the ds-menu CSS class API exactly — same background, shadow, typography, and item states. The visual is a position: fixed overlay with a transparent backdrop; no AG Grid popup classes are involved.

Grid options required: suppressContextMenu: true (row cells) and suppressHeaderContextMenu: true (column headers).
Outputs: (headerContextMenu) on ds-table-header-cell — (rowContextMenu) on ds-table-row-cell. Both emit { x, y, params }.
Default builders: buildDefaultHeaderContextMenuItems(colId, api) and buildDefaultRowContextMenuItems(value) — spread and extend per project.

Right-click any column header or data row to try it.

AG Grid — Live Simulation

ag-grid-community v31 · all community features enabled

Fully interactive AG Grid instance using vanilla JS shim renderers that reproduce the exact DOM structure of DsTableHeaderCellComponent and DsTableRowCellComponent, so DS CSS applies correctly without Angular. Demonstrates: multi-column sort, text / number / date / set filters, column resize, drag-to-reorder columns, column pinning, row checkbox selection, quick search, CSV export, column visibility panel, and right-click context menus. In production wire up via DS_TABLE_DEFAULT_COL_DEF and onfloTheme — see .claude/specs/specs-table.md for the canonical Angular integration pattern.

Page Layout

CSS pattern · preview/index.html · see .claude/specs/specs-layout.md §Page Layouts

Full application shell — composes ds-nav-sidebar, ds-top-nav, an optional collapsible sub-navigation panel (ds-subnav), and a main content area (ds-page-content). The floating ds-nav-expand toggle sits at the right edge of the sub-nav and repositions when the panel collapses. Sub-nav open state is managed via [open] on ds-nav-expand and .is-collapsed on .ds-subnav. Click the toggle to try it. ADA: role="navigation" on sidebar and subnav; aria-expanded on the toggle tracks panel state.

3

Page Title

Split Page Layout

CSS pattern · preview/index.html · see .claude/specs/specs-layout.md §Page Layouts

Split page layout demos — full application shell with split content area. See the Components tab → Split Page for ratio variants (50/50, 70/30, 30/70, 75/25, 25/75) and the fixed vs. resizable handle. Angular: use CdkDragModule from @angular/cdk/drag-drop on the handle for production. See .claude/specs/specs-layout.md §Split Page Layout for Angular wiring details.
